codeReview.summary: Implementation adds procedural memory module with Bayesian Beta posterior distribution for confidence scoring of procedures, strategies, and action patterns. All expected behaviors are covered and tests pass.

summary: Feature mem-procedural-memory passes review. Implementation adds procedural.rs with Procedure struct (stores strategies/procedures with effectiveness tracking), BetaPosterior struct (Bayesian inference using Beta conjugate prior for confidence scoring), SqliteProceduralStore (SQLite persistence with context similarity search), and find_by_context method (keyword matching and confidence filtering). 30 unit tests cover Beta distribution math and store operations. All verification commands succeeded: cargo build, cargo test -p swell-memory -- procedural (30 tests), cargo clippy. Expected behaviors fully met: procedures stored with effectiveness scores, Beta posterior tracks belief distribution, procedures retrievable by context similarity.
